name: Classic Chicken Gumbo
recipeIngredient: ½ pound Okra, cut into ¼-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large Dutch oven, melt the shortening over low heat; add flour and cook, stirring, until brown, about 10 minutes (do not hurry; if the flour burns, the roux is ruined).
2. Add onions and bell pepper; cook until onions are translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Slowly add warm broth; stir until the broth reaches a boil.
4. Add tomatoes, okra, rice, celery, salt, pepper, thyme, and bay leaf; bring to a boil.
5. Add chicken; when the mixture boils again, reduce heat to low, cover, and cook about 20 minutes.
6. Stir and cook, covered, for an additional 20 minutes.
